steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: Some historians is a plural noun phrase (subject). The blank is followed by that this 'tulip mania' was..., which is a dependent clause (an object clause).

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: Claim is the third-person plural form that matches the plural subject Some historians. The other three options are non-finite verb forms—participles and infinitive—that cannot function as a main verb. That matches choice B — B is correct.
